name: Applications
description: Total submitted credit applications.

name: Approved Applications
description: Approved application count.

name: Approval Rate
description: Approved applications divided by total applications.

name: Disbursed Loans
description: Funded loan count.

name: Disbursement Amount
description: Total funded amount.

name: Loan Book Balance
description: Outstanding principal balance in selected snapshot context.

name: DPD 30+ Balance
description: Outstanding balance with 30 or more days past due.

name: DPD 60+ Balance
description: Outstanding balance with 60 or more days past due.

name: NPL Balance
description: Outstanding 90+ DPD or non-performing balance.

name: Delinquency Rate
description: DPD 30+ balance divided by loan book balance.

name: NPL Rate
description: NPL balance divided by loan book balance.

name: Expected Loss
description: Expected credit loss amount.

name: Expected Loss Rate
description: Expected loss divided by loan book balance.

name: Provision Amount
description: Provision amount calculated from expected loss policy.

name: Provision Coverage
description: Provision amount divided by expected loss.

name: Autopay Failure Loans
description: Loans with autopay failure flag.

name: Recovery Amount
description: Total recovery amount from collection cases.

name: Case Balance
description: Total balance assigned to collection cases.

name: Recovery Rate
description: Recovered amount divided by collection case balance.

name: Collections SLA %
description: Share of collection cases handled within SLA.

name: Promise To Pay %
description: Share of cases with promise to pay.

name: Vintage 30+ Rate
description: Vintage cohort DPD 30+ balance share.

name: Vintage Loss Rate
description: Average cumulative loss rate across visible vintage cells.

name: Roll Rate
description: Average roll rate across selected transition cells.

name: Forecast Provision
description: Forecast provision amount.

name: Forecast Expected Loss
description: Forecast expected loss.

name: Incremental Provision
description: Incremental provision bridge amount.
